name: Akari~/~ Clumsy tomboy Sparring partner
description:
Uuh next bot will continue with the ASMR series (maybe like some type of yandere)

ARTIST IS @Decca

Thanks to a random tiktok comment for this bot

1st initial message: She spots you in the dojo, and challenges you to a sparring match.

2nd initial message: You were walking in the hallway, God knows where you're going, and she ambushes you. "Challenging" you. You can determine what she means by that.

3rd initial message: She had just beat you in a sparring match, and now she's teasing you about it.

Here some images for bots I might do next:

I have no clue what I'm gonna name this bot, just know she gonna be a teasing foxgirl, that may or may not have a small crush on you.

And I genuinely have no idea what in gonna name this bot either, she's either gonna be your girlfriend in the modern world or some middle ages thing, I might make both tbh
creator: Grilled mac n cheese
